label: app-launched
context: App launched, onboarding screen visible

label: onboarding-complete
context: Conductor profile set — name Corey, pronouns they/them, software engineer bio

label: settings-conductor-tab
context: Settings open on Conductor tab — filled profile visible

label: settings-tones-tab
context: Tones tab — preset tones like Professional, Collaborative, Concise visible

label: settings-system-prompts-tab
context: System Prompts tab — reusable prompt templates for voices

label: settings-general-tab
context: General tab — theme and app-level preferences

label: settings-providers-tab
context: Providers tab — all built-in providers listed, none yet enabled

label: anthropic-api-enabled
context: Anthropic API enabled — API key section and model list visible

label: anthropic-cli-mode
context: Anthropic CLI enabled — command and args fields visible below API section

label: openai-enabled
context: OpenAI enabled in API mode — API key badge and model dropdown visible

label: openai-models-fetched
context: OpenAI model list refreshed from the API

label: gemini-enabled
context: Gemini enabled — API-only, no CLI option

label: custom-providers-section
context: Custom Providers section visible — Add Custom Provider button shown

label: llama-form-filled
context: Llama 3.2 custom provider form filled — name, base URL http://localhost:11434/v1, model llama3.2:1b

label: llama-provider-saved
context: Llama 3.2 custom provider saved and card visible

label: qwen-form-filled
context: Qwen 2.5 custom provider form filled — same Ollama base URL, model qwen2.5:0.5b

label: qwen-provider-saved
context: Qwen 2.5 custom provider saved — both Ollama providers now listed

label: composition-builder-opened-1
context: Composition builder opened for first composition

label: composition-named-broadcast
context: Composition named "Research Panel"

label: composition-mode-broadcast
context: Mode set to Broadcast — all voices answer every message

label: composition-anthropic-added
context: Anthropic voice added to Research Panel

label: composition-openai-added
context: OpenAI voice added to Research Panel

label: composition-broadcast-saved
context: Research Panel broadcast composition saved

label: composition-builder-opened-2
context: Composition builder opened for second composition

label: composition-named-conductor
context: Composition named "Directed Q&A" — conductor mode is default

label: composition-conductor-anthropic-added
context: Anthropic voice added to Directed Q&A

label: composition-conductor-openai-added
context: OpenAI voice added to Directed Q&A

label: composition-conductor-saved
context: Directed Q&A conductor composition saved

label: composition-builder-opened-3
context: Composition builder opened for Ollama Duo composition

label: composition-named-ollama
context: Composition named "Ollama Duo" — conductor mode

label: composition-ollama-llama-added
context: Llama 3.2 local voice added to Ollama Duo

label: composition-ollama-qwen-added
context: Qwen 2.5 local voice added to Ollama Duo

label: composition-ollama-saved
context: Ollama Duo composition saved with both local voices

label: session-broadcast-started
context: Research Panel broadcast session started — both voices ready

label: broadcast-round1-sent
context: Research question sent — Anthropic and OpenAI stream simultaneously

label: broadcast-round1-complete
context: Both voices finished round 1 — parallel responses visible

label: broadcast-round2-sent
context: Follow-up sent — voices read and respond to each other

label: broadcast-round2-complete
context: Round 2 complete — voices have engaged with each other's answers

label: session-conductor-started
context: Directed Q&A conductor session started

label: directed-anthropic-targeted
context: Anthropic targeted via @mention for the first question

label: directed-anthropic-responded
context: Anthropic answered — only this voice responded

label: directed-openai-targeted
context: OpenAI targeted via @mention to respond to Anthropic's answer

label: directed-openai-responded
context: OpenAI responded — a direct reply to Anthropic's answer

label: session-ollama-started
context: Ollama Duo session started — two local models ready

label: directed-llama-targeted
context: Llama 3.2 targeted with a simple question

label: directed-llama-responded
context: Llama 3.2 answered locally — no cloud required

label: directed-qwen-targeted
context: Qwen 2.5 targeted with a different simple question

label: directed-qwen-responded
context: Qwen 2.5 answered — two local models, one conversation
